transcript: Speaker A: Please don't cancel. ithu ente aadyathe ride aanu. Enikku 200 rupa loss aakum. Sir, please don't cancel my ride. I have been waiting since the morning. This is my first ride. [Please don't cancel. This is my first ride. I will lose 200 rupees. Sir, please don't cancel my ride. I have been waiting since the morning. This is my first ride.] Speaker B: Chetta I have changed the route, please check your app. [Brother, I have changed the route, please check your app.] Speaker A: Ma'am English... No no ma'am. Speaker B: Chetta I want to change my drop location. [Brother, I want to change my drop location.] Speaker A: Of course ma'am. Please change it in the app. I will adjust the route accordingly. Customers nodu English onnum samsarikkan pattunnilla, athukondu avar cancel aakki ondirikkunnu alle. Enikku motham nashtamaayi kondirikkukayanu. Oh super SpeakX app ente jeevitham thanne maatti marichu. Pathinanchu divasam kondu njan English um padichu. Ippo customers okke enikku full respect um tips um tharunnu. [I couldn't speak English with customers, so they kept cancelling. I was losing everything. SpeakX app changed my life. In 15 days, I learned English. Now customers give me respect and tips.] Kandille, English il samsarikkan pattathathukondu enthokke prashnangal aanu undaakunnath. Oru divasam ente cab il oru valiya company manager vannirunnu. Avar enikku SpeakX app paranju thannu. Ithoru AI English teaching app aanu. Ithil avar English padippichu tharunnu. Athum pathinanchu irupathu divasam kondu. Avar paranju daily oru 10-15 minutes engilum practice cheyyan. Njan athupole thanne cheythu. Passenger nodu engane samsarikkanam ennum, avarodu location engane chodikkanam ennokke njan padichu. I am very grateful to SpeakX app. Ee app ente jeevitham thanne maatti marichu. Ippo aalukal enikku tips um tharunnu, enna respect um tharunnu. Pinne randu maasam aayittu ithuvare oru ride polum cancel aayittilla. Njan parayunnu SpeakX app English padikkaan best app aanu. [See the problems caused by not speaking English. A company manager in my cab recommended SpeakX, an AI English learning app. It teaches English in 15-20 days with 10-15 minutes of daily practice. I learned how to converse with passengers. I am grateful to SpeakX; it changed my life. Now I get tips, respect, and no cancellations. SpeakX is the best app to learn English.]

summary: A Malayalam-speaking cab driver shares how his inability to speak English led to cancelled rides and lost income. After a passenger recommended the SpeakX AI learning app, he practiced daily and can now confidently converse with passengers. He encourages viewers to download SpeakX to improve their English and career prospects.
